title: Playback an auth middleware change
summary: Walks through a middleware introduction and route registration change.

explanation.title: Introduce auth middleware
explanation.what: Adds a central auth middleware function.
explanation.why: Authentication logic should be shared instead of duplicated.
explanation.impact: Protected routes can consistently reject missing headers.
explanation.risk: Routes must remember to register the middleware.

narration.short: This change introduces central auth middleware.

explanation.title: Wire the middleware into project routes
explanation.what: Imports and uses the auth middleware in the routes module.
explanation.why: The middleware only works if routes opt into it.

narration.short: The route file now uses the auth middleware.
